Award-winning craftsmanship

Built to the highest standards with meticulous attention to detail.

Exceptional locations

Premium settings across the most desirable communities.

Sustainable by design

Future-focused homes that are beautiful, efficient and enduring.

Customer at the heart

We build lasting relationships as well as outstanding homes.

Our legacy

Building homes. Creating legacies.

At Kingsvale Homes, we believe a home is more than a place to live. It is a foundation for life. For over a decade, we have been designing and building exceptional homes and communities across the South, combining timeless architecture with modern living.

Our vision & process

Beautiful homes in exceptional locations.

Land wanted

Do you have land with potential?

We are actively seeking land and development opportunities across the South. If you own a site or know of a potential opportunity, we would love to hear from you.
